---
title: "Dictionary"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(DT)
library(formattable)
dictionary_hs<- read_excel("Diccionario.xlsx", sheet = "HS")
dictionary_choices<- read_excel("Diccionario.xlsx", sheet = "choices") 

dictionary_hs<- dictionary_hs[,c('choice','data_type','question','Dimension','new_name')]


dictionary_choices$selection<- paste(dictionary_choices$name, "=",dictionary_choices$label)

dictionary_choices <- aggregate(selection ~ list_name, dictionary_choices, paste, collapse = " | ")

dic<- merge(dictionary_hs,dictionary_choices, by.x = 'choice',by.y = 'list_name', all.x = TRUE)

dic <- dic[, c("new_name", "Dimension", "question", "data_type","choice","selection")]

dic <- dic[order(dic$Dimension, dic$new_name), ]


```


```{r echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
DT::datatable(dic, filter = 'top', options = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE), rownames = FALSE)
```
